canonical_answer: A person with short dark hair wears a red track jacket with white stripes and white sneakers. They perform breakdance spins on a light brown wooden floor before standing up with hands on hips. A black tripod stand with studio lighting sits to the left of the person. The background consists of a solid bright green screen. Text overlays including 'Subscribe' appear in the top left corner.
